achievements.name: Six Fronts, One Commander
achievements.description: Win a skirmish match with each of the six factions.

achievements.name: Silent Watchers
achievements.description: Win a skirmish match as the Arcloft Syndicate.

achievements.name: Sovereign Skies
achievements.description: Win a skirmish match as Valkyr Command.

achievements.name: Crimson Tide
achievements.description: Win a skirmish match as the Kragmore Clans.

achievements.name: Iron Bastion
achievements.description: Win a skirmish match as the Bastion Republic.

achievements.name: Steel March
achievements.description: Win a skirmish match as the Ironmarch Union.

achievements.name: Storm's Fury
achievements.description: Win a skirmish match as the Stormrend Accord.

achievements.name: Master of the Seas
achievements.description: Win a match on a map with a naval theatre.

achievements.name: Blitz Commander
achievements.description: Win a skirmish match in under 10 minutes.

achievements.name: Attrition Warfare
achievements.description: Destroy 100 enemy units across all matches.

achievements.name: Tactical Retreat
achievements.description: Lose a skirmish match. Every commander falls once.

achievements.name: Machine Breaker
achievements.description: Defeat a Hard difficulty AI opponent.
